response.justification: Bogdan Szabo's background is heavily focused on software development, web/mobile applications, and embedded systems, with limited evidence of experience in SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or AI accelerator optimization. While he has strong software engineering skills, his resume lacks direct exposure to deep-learning workload analysis, GPU architecture, or performance bottlenecks in hardware contexts, which are core to the Principal Performance Architect role.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with expertise in multiple languages and frameworks (TypeScript, D, C++, etc.)
Proven experience in system architecture and optimization (e.g., low-latency apps, micro-services infrastructure)
Diverse technical experience across industries (embedded systems, robotics, AI-agent infrastructure)
concerns: No clear experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or AI accelerator optimization
Lacks demonstrated expertise in deep neural network workloads, GPU architecture, or SIMD/MIMD architectures
Education and career focus is primarily in software development rather than hardware or AI systems
